creator: xmj@FreeBSD.org
text:
Building it right now, but here's something I stumbled over:

Satellites were removed prior to 8.6.4

https://about.gitlab.com/2015/10/27/gitlab-8-dot-1-dot-2-released/#comment-2331814217

So the line in Makefile to create them,
        ${MKDIR} ${STAGEDIR}/home/git/gitlab-satellites
and the line in pkg-plist to bring them into the package,
@dir(,git,750) /home/git/gitlab-satellites

are unnecessary
